title: Provenance and coverage boundary

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: The reader-facing package is scoped to the approved top-five cohort; full-universe inference is not supported.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

panel_map.a: Top-five mapping completeness vs full-universe clean mapping.
panel_map.b: Scenario labels affected by the official-label correction.
panel_map.c: Top-five zero missingness vs full-universe not-clean boundary.

evidence_hierarchy.hero_evidence: Top-five mapping completeness vs full-universe clean mapping.
evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: The full universe remains a selection boundary and is not a validity claim basis.

statistics_notes: Bars show cell counts and denominators; hatches mark boundary or correction categories.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: The full universe remains a selection boundary and is not a validity claim basis.
